section_miscategorizations.text: Order neurological exam to rule out peripheral neuropathy.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A neurological exam has already been described in the Findings section, so this line is ambiguous: it reads more like an order for a diagnostic test (appropriate for Plan) but is phrased as if the exam has not yet occurred, which can confuse the temporal sequence of findings vs. planned workup. However, it does not substantially distort the clinical meaning.
